task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Full SaaS: Project Tracker** (Level 10)

Build a project management API. Users register/login. Projects have name, description, status (active/archived). Tasks belong to projects with title, description, status (todo/in_progress/done), assignee_id. Auth required. Users can only see projects they own. Full CRUD on both resources.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required
  name
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend

allow signup and login

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required
  name, required

create a Projects table:
  name, required
  description
  status
  owner_id, required

create a Tasks table:
  title, required
  description
  status
  project_id, required
  assignee_id

# Registration endpoint
when user calls POST /api/register sending user_data:
  validate user_data:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required, min 8
    name is text, required
  saved_user = save user_data to Users
  send back saved_user with status 201

# Login endpoint - return a mock token
when user calls POST /api/login sending credentials:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required
    password is text, required
  send back { token is 'jwt_token_generated' } with status 200

# Get all projects
when user calls GET /api/projects:
  requires login
  projects = get all Projects
  send back projects

# Create a new project
when user calls POST /api/projects sending project_data:
  requires login
  validate project_data:
    name is text, required
  project_data's owner_id is 1
  set project_data's owner_id to owner_id
  saved_project = save project_data to Projects
  send back saved_project with status 201

# Get a specific project
when user calls GET /api/projects/:id:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this id
  send back project

# Update a project
when user calls PUT /api/projects/:id sending changes:
  requires login
  saved = save changes to Projects
  send back saved

# Delete a project
when user calls DELETE /api/projects/:id:
  requires login
  delete Project with this id
  send back 'Project deleted'

# Get all tasks
when user calls GET /api/tasks:
  requires login
  tasks = get all Tasks
  send back tasks

# Create a new task
when user calls POST /api/tasks sending task_data:
  requires login
  validate task_data:
    title is text, required
    project_id is number, required
  saved_task = save task_data to Tasks
  send back saved_task with status 201

# Get a specific task
when user calls GET /api/tasks/:id:
  requires login
  task = look up Task with this id
  send back task

# Update a task
when user calls PUT /api/tasks/:id sending changes:
  requires login
  saved = save changes to Tasks
  send back saved

# Delete a task
when user calls DELETE /api/tasks/:id:
  requires login
  delete Task with this id
  send back 'Task deleted'
